creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Arrigo Marchiori from comment #4)
Thank you for you report and followup.

I will be removing the dir_index feature altogether. It's an interesting ext3/4 -specific feature but it is not necessary, and we have two open bugs reports concerning it.

Luckily version control works nicely and it can always be resurrected if we need it.
